reviews.comment:
Espantosa atención,  el playero un maleducado y el combustible más caro del pais

Terrible service, the attendant was rude, and the fuel is the most expensive in the country.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURod3ItYVZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siendo una YPF del ACA, esperaba mucho más, poco personal, el servicompras no tiene sillas y sólo acepta efectivo. Los baños sucios y sin papel higiénico. Por su ubicación estratégica debería ser un establecimiento modelo. En definitiva, precaria y triste.

(Translated by Google)
Being a YPF in the ACA, I expected much more: few staff, the grocery store has no chairs and only accepts cash. The bathrooms are dirty and have no toilet paper. Given its strategic location, this should be a model establishment. In short, it's dilapidated and sad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoN09ubEh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Aprendimos a valorar ese lugar como parada obligada. Hay baños, combustible, venta de bebidas y alimentos. Difícilmente pasarías de largo por las distancias entre las ciudades. Mil viajes, dos mil paradas allí. Una de ida y otra de vuelta. Gente que trabaja brindando un gran servicio. Muchas gracias!

(Translated by Google)
We learned to appreciate that place as a must-stop. There are restrooms, fuel, and places to buy drinks and food. You'd hardly pass it by, given the distances between the cities. A thousand trips, two thousand stops there. One on the way there and one on the way back. People who work hard providing great service. Thank you so much!

reviewReply.comment: Mario, muchisimas gracias por su comentario, estamos felices de brindarle el mejor servicio. Lo esperamos a la vuelta .

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoMkxHNjhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Espectacular lugar para descansar en medio un viaje. Único lugar no hay otro en kilómetros. Espacio para descansar parrillero y mesas. Ojo con las espinas que tiran las loras donde hacen sus nidos.

(Translated by Google)
A spectacular place to rest during a trip. It's unique; there's nothing else like it for miles around. It has a place to relax, a grill, and tables. Watch out for the thorns dropped by the parrots where they build their nests.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURod0o3N2ZBEAE
